---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r}
library(shiny)
library(Seurat)
library(plotly)
library(MASS)
library(viridis)
```

```{r}
seu <- readRDS("C:/Users/dan_m/OneDrive - University College London/UCL_Senior_Research_Fellow/Cutaneous lupus public data/GSE186476_RAW/bili_etal_cle_immune_only.rds")
```

```{r}
seu <- AddModuleScore(
  seu,
  features = list(c("FOXP3","IL2RA","CTLA4")),
  name = "TregScore"
)
```
```{r}
ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("scRNA Gating Explorer"),
  
  # Top row: Scatter plot + gating summary + gene selectors
  fluidRow(
    column(width = 6,
           plotlyOutput("scatter"),
           selectInput("gene_x", "Gene X", choices = scaled_genes, selected = "CD3D"),
           selectInput("gene_y", "Gene Y", choices = scaled_genes, selected = "CD8A")
    ),
    column(width = 6,
           h4("Gating Summary"),
           verbatimTextOutput("gate_summary")
    )
  ),
  
  # Bottom row: UMAP + histogram
  fluidRow(
    column(width = 6,
           plotlyOutput("umap")
    ),
    column(width = 6,
           h4("Histogram of gated cells"),
           selectInput("hist_gene", "Marker for histogram", choices = scaled_genes, selected = "CD3D"),
           plotlyOutput("histogram")
    )
  )
)
```
```{r}
server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # Store selected cell IDs
  selected_cells <- reactiveVal(character(0))
  
  ###### SCATTER PLOT ######
  output$scatter <- renderPlotly({
    
    df <- FetchData(seu, vars = c(input$gene_x, input$gene_y), slot = "data")
    df$cell <- rownames(df)
    
    # Add jitter for clarity
    df[[input$gene_x]] <- jitter(df[[input$gene_x]], amount = 0.02)
    df[[input$gene_y]] <- jitter(df[[input$gene_y]], amount = 0.02)
    
    # Arcsinh transform
    df[[input$gene_x]] <- asinh(df[[input$gene_x]])
    df[[input$gene_y]] <- asinh(df[[input$gene_y]])
    
    # 2D density for coloring
    dens <- MASS::kde2d(df[[input$gene_x]], df[[input$gene_y]], n = 100)
    ix <- findInterval(df[[input$gene_x]], dens$x)
    iy <- findInterval(df[[input$gene_y]], dens$y)
    df$density <- dens$z[cbind(ix, iy)]
    
    # Calculate axis buffer
    x_min <- min(df[[input$gene_x]], na.rm = TRUE)
    x_max <- max(df[[input$gene_x]], na.rm = TRUE)
    y_min <- min(df[[input$gene_y]], na.rm = TRUE)
    y_max <- max(df[[input$gene_y]], na.rm = TRUE)
    x_buffer <- 0.05 * (x_max - x_min)
    y_buffer <- 0.05 * (y_max - y_min)
    
    plot_ly(
      df,
      x = ~get(input$gene_x),
      y = ~get(input$gene_y),
      type = "scattergl",
      mode = "markers",
      key = ~cell,
      source = "scatter",
      color = ~density,
      colors = viridis(100),
      marker = list(size = 4),
      showlegend = FALSE
    ) %>%
      layout(
        dragmode = "select",
        xaxis = list(
          title = input$gene_x,
          range = c(min(0, x_min - x_buffer), x_max + x_buffer)
        ),
        yaxis = list(
          title = input$gene_y,
          range = c(min(0, y_min - y_buffer), y_max + y_buffer)
        )
      )
  })
  
  ###### CAPTURE SELECTION ######
  observeEvent(event_data("plotly_selected", source = "scatter"), {
    s <- event_data("plotly_selected", source = "scatter")
    if (!is.null(s)) {
      selected_cells(s$key)
    } else {
      selected_cells(character(0))
    }
  })
  
  ###### UMAP PLOT ######
  output$umap <- renderPlotly({
    emb <- Embeddings(seu, "umap")[,1:2]
    df_umap <- data.frame(
      UMAP1 = emb[,1],
      UMAP2 = emb[,2],
      cell = rownames(emb)
    )
    
    # Default grey, red for selected cells
    df_umap$color <- "grey"
    df_umap$color[df_umap$cell %in% selected_cells()] <- "red"
    
    plot_ly(
      df_umap,
      x = ~UMAP1,
      y = ~UMAP2,
      type = "scattergl",
      mode = "markers",
      color = ~color,
      colors = c("grey", "red"),
      marker = list(size = 4),
      showlegend = FALSE
    ) %>%
      layout(
        xaxis = list(title = "UMAP1", zeroline=F),
        yaxis = list(title = "UMAP2", zeroline=F)
      )
  })
  
  ###### GATING SUMMARY ######
  output$gate_summary <- renderPrint({
    total_cells <- ncol(seu)
    gated <- length(selected_cells())
    pct_gated <- ifelse(total_cells > 0, round(100 * gated / total_cells, 2), 0)
    cat("Total cells:", total_cells, "\n")
    cat("Gated cells:", gated, "\n")
    cat("Percent gated:", pct_gated, "%\n")
  })
  
  ###### HISTOGRAM/DENSITY OF SELECTED MARKER ######
  output$hist_marker <- renderPlotly({
    req(input$hist_gene)  # dropdown for histogram gene
    
    df <- FetchData(seu, vars = input$hist_gene, slot = "data")
    df$cell <- rownames(df)
    df$gated <- ifelse(df$cell %in% selected_cells(), "Gated", "All")
    
    plot_ly(df, x = ~get(input$hist_gene), color = ~gated, type = "histogram", 
            opacity = 0.6, barmode = "overlay") %>%
      layout(
        xaxis = list(title = input$hist_gene),
        yaxis = list(title = "Count")
      )
  })
  
}
```
```{r}
shinyApp(ui, server)
```
